data.current_summary: Financial institution contact information for fraud or operational issues
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve bank contact information by ID and reason
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves contact details for a specific financial institution based on the bank identifier and the reason for contact (e.g., fraud reporting, operational inquiries). Requires API key authentication. Returns a BankContact object containing the relevant contact information for the specified reason. No state changes occur.
